communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Freedom of Information Act, I hereby request the following records:

Any and all e-mail, cellular telephone texts or other messages between Christopher/Chris Williamson and Ms. Foster. Please include any other internal electronic communications such as Slack, etc. 

Time period requested is the prior 90 days beginning May 6, 2026.

Request includes personal (“BYOD”) and employer provided devices, wherever found.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 20 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Justin Huertas

title: Enrollment, Individual Item Cost and Sources

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the South Carolina Public Records Law, I hereby request the following records:

Records showing the following:

1.	Records showing the number of cadets from West Virginia who applied, accepted, matriculated, and if they graduated by class, year, race, gender, athlete, and non-athlete for the period starting with Academic Year 1998 - 1999 through academic year 2025 - 2026. By city and/or county is appreciated but not essential.
2.	All cadet uniform issue items with amounts issued to each cadet, their supplier(s), and the institution’s item cost for said items.
3.	 Supplier of the weapons issued to cadets, item cost price, and the quantity and type of those weapons in inventory.
4.	Supplier of the weapons used by cadets for marksmanship, field ROTC and other training including item cost price, and the quantity and type of those weapons in inventory.
5.	All cadet bedding issue items (including the bed itself), their supplier(s) and the institution’s item cost for said items.
6.	The most current operating budget covering the Corps of Cadets and related activities (not the non-Corps College or University functions).
7.	Copy of the current ROTC agreement for any Service ROTC units

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 15 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Anonymous
